name: blob-decode-with-internal-whitespace
comment: Edge case hand-picked (not fuzzer-generated) because it is verified to decode identically in both languages: internal whitespace mixed into an otherwise-valid, properly-padded base64 string ('YW  Jj', properly-padded once the whitespace is discarded) is stripped by both Node's Buffer.from and Python's base64.b64decode(validate=False), leaving 'YWJj' which decodes to the 3 bytes of "abc".
